scripts.ensure:rollup-native: node -e "const cp=require('node:child_process'); const fs=require('node:fs'); const path=require('node:path'); const root=process.cwd(); const rollupPkgPath=path.join(root,'node_modules','rollup','package.json'); if (!fs.existsSync(rollupPkgPath)) { console.log('Rollup is not installed yet; skipping native binary check.'); process.exit(0); } const rollupVersion=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(rollupPkgPath,'utf8')).version; const report=process.platform==='linux' && typeof process.report?.getReport==='function' ? process.report.getReport() : null; const libc=process.platform!=='linux' ? null : report?.header?.glibcVersionRuntime ? 'gnu' : Array.isArray(report?.sharedObjects) && report.sharedObjects.some((value)=>String(value).toLowerCase().includes('musl')) ? 'musl' : 'gnu'; const key=process.platform+'-'+process.arch+(libc?'-'+libc:''); const packages={'android-arm':'@rollup/rollup-android-arm-eabi','android-arm64':'@rollup/rollup-android-arm64','darwin-arm64':'@rollup/rollup-darwin-arm64','darwin-x64':'@rollup/rollup-darwin-x64','freebsd-arm64':'@rollup/rollup-freebsd-arm64','freebsd-x64':'@rollup/rollup-freebsd-x64','linux-arm-gnu':'@rollup/rollup-linux-arm-gnueabihf','linux-arm-musl':'@rollup/rollup-linux-arm-musleabihf','linux-arm64-gnu':'@rollup/rollup-linux-arm64-gnu','linux-arm64-musl':'@rollup/rollup-linux-arm64-musl','linux-loong64-gnu':'@rollup/rollup-linux-loong64-gnu','linux-loong64-musl':'@rollup/rollup-linux-loong64-musl','linux-ppc64-gnu':'@rollup/rollup-linux-ppc64-gnu','linux-ppc64-musl':'@rollup/rollup-linux-ppc64-musl','linux-riscv64-gnu':'@rollup/rollup-linux-riscv64-gnu','linux-riscv64-musl':'@rollup/rollup-linux-riscv64-musl','linux-s390x-gnu':'@rollup/rollup-linux-s390x-gnu','linux-x64-gnu':'@rollup/rollup-linux-x64-gnu','linux-x64-musl':'@rollup/rollup-linux-x64-musl','openbsd-x64':'@rollup/rollup-openbsd-x64','win32-arm64':'@rollup/rollup-win32-arm64-msvc','win32-ia32':'@rollup/rollup-win32-ia32-msvc','win32-x64':'@rollup/rollup-win32-x64-msvc'}; const nativePackageName=packages[key]; if (!nativePackageName) { console.log('No Rollup native package mapping for '+process.platform+'/'+process.arch+'; skipping.'); process.exit(0); } try { require.resolve(nativePackageName); console.log('Rollup native package already present: '+nativePackageName); process.exit(0); } catch (error) { if (error?.code!=='MODULE_NOT_FOUND') throw error; } const npmExecutable=process.platform==='win32' ? 'npm.cmd' : 'npm'; console.log('Installing missing Rollup native package: '+nativePackageName+'@'+rollupVersion); cp.execFileSync(npmExecutable,['install','--no-save','--no-package-lock','--ignore-scripts','--legacy-peer-deps',nativePackageName+'@'+rollupVersion],{cwd:root,stdio:'inherit'});"
scripts.ensure:build: node -e "const cp=require('node:child_process'); const fs=require('node:fs'); const path=require('node:path'); const root=process.cwd(); const serverEntryPath=path.join(root,'build','server','index.js'); const run=(name)=>cp.execSync((process.platform==='win32'?'cmd /c ':'')+'npm run '+name,{cwd:root,stdio:'inherit'}); if (!fs.existsSync(serverEntryPath)) { console.log('Missing built server entry at '+serverEntryPath+'; running build now.'); run('build'); } else { run('fix:server-entry'); }"
scripts.fix:server-entry: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const path=require('node:path'); const root=process.cwd(); const serverDir=path.join(root,'build','server'); const assetsDir=path.join(serverDir,'assets'); const serverEntryPath=path.join(serverDir,'index.js'); const serverBuildPath=path.join(assetsDir,'server-build.js'); const stableChunkName='index.js'; const stableChunkPath=path.join(assetsDir,stableChunkName); if (!fs.existsSync(assetsDir)) throw new Error('Missing server assets directory: '+assetsDir); const read=(filePath)=>fs.existsSync(filePath)?fs.readFileSync(filePath,'utf8'):''; const replaceAll=(source,needle,replacement)=>source.includes(needle)?source.split(needle).join(replacement):source; const findReferencedChunk=(source,pattern)=>{ if (!source) return null; for (const match of source.matchAll(pattern)) { const chunkName=match[1]; if (chunkName && chunkName.endsWith('.js') && fs.existsSync(path.join(assetsDir,chunkName))) return chunkName; } return null; }; const listCandidates=()=>fs.readdirSync(assetsDir).filter((name)=>name.endsWith('.js') && name!==stableChunkName && name!=='server-build.js'); const serverEntrySource=read(serverEntryPath); const serverBuildSource=read(serverBuildPath); if (serverEntrySource.includes('./assets/index.js') && fs.existsSync(stableChunkPath)) { console.log('Stable server chunk already present at '+stableChunkPath); process.exit(0); } let sourceChunkName=findReferencedChunk(serverEntrySource,/[\"']\.\/assets\/([^\"']+\.js)[\"']/g) ?? findReferencedChunk(serverBuildSource,/[\"']\.\/([^\"']+\.js)[\"']/g) ?? (fs.existsSync(stableChunkPath)?stableChunkName:null); if (!sourceChunkName) { const candidates=listCandidates(); sourceChunkName=candidates.find((name)=>/^index(?:-.*)?\.js$/.test(name)) ?? (candidates.length===1?candidates[0]:null); } if (!sourceChunkName) { throw new Error('Could not determine server chunk in '+assetsDir+'. Available files: '+fs.readdirSync(assetsDir).sort().join(', ')); } const sourceChunkPath=path.join(assetsDir,sourceChunkName); if (!fs.existsSync(sourceChunkPath)) throw new Error('Resolved server chunk does not exist: '+sourceChunkPath); if (sourceChunkName!==stableChunkName) fs.copyFileSync(sourceChunkPath,stableChunkPath); if (serverEntrySource) { const updated=sourceChunkName===stableChunkName?serverEntrySource:replaceAll(serverEntrySource,'./assets/'+sourceChunkName,'./assets/index.js'); if (updated!==serverEntrySource) fs.writeFileSync(serverEntryPath,updated,'utf8'); } if (serverBuildSource) { const updated=sourceChunkName===stableChunkName?serverBuildSource:replaceAll(serverBuildSource,'./'+sourceChunkName,'./index.js'); if (updated!==serverBuildSource) fs.writeFileSync(serverBuildPath,updated,'utf8'); } console.log('Normalized server chunk '+sourceChunkName+' -> '+stableChunkName);"
scripts.build: npm run ensure:rollup-native && react-router build && npm run fix:server-entry
